title: Procter & Gamble India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Procter & Gamble India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Procter & Gamble India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Procter & Gamble India:
Procter & Gamble India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Procter & Gamble India!
